LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHAEL PERONA, D.D.S'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO BE HEARD ON DECEMBER 3, 2021, BY JUDGE ULMER. JUDGE SCHULMAN RECUSES HIMSELF FROM THIS CASE. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT'S REPLY BRIEF INDICATES THAT AN OPPOSITION WAS SERVED ON DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS YET TO FILE THAT OPPOSITION WITH THE COURT BASED ON THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE THE OPPOSITION WITH THE COURT IMMEDIATELY. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Set For Trial On Jan-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Continued To Feb-02-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MICHAEL PERONA, D.D.S.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer to the complaint's second cause of action - "violation of the unfair competition law" - is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff concedes that an economic injury is an element of this count, but has not pled it.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Continued To Dec-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL PERONA, D.D.S's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Continued to be heard on December 3, 2021, by Judge Ulmer. Judge Schulman recuses himself from this case. In addition, defendant's reply brief indicates that an opposition was served on defendant. Plaintiff has yet to file that opposition with the court based on the court's register of actions. Plaintiff is instructed to file the opposition with the court immediately.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
